summary: Iteration 21 - Tested Release Wizard major overhaul with 4-tab professional layout. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including 4-tab navigation, form fields, platform grid, validation badges, and Edit buttons.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
POST /api/auth/login - admin login successful
GET /api/distributions/stores - returns 10+ DSP stores including Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon, YouTube, Tidal, Deezer
POST /api/releases - creates release with full metadata (title, label, UPC, product type, genre, copyright, production line, etc.)
POST /api/tracks - creates track with auto-generated ISRC
GET /api/releases/{id} - returns release with tracks array
POST /api/releases requires auth (401/422)
POST /api/tracks requires auth (401)
POST /api/distributions/submit/{id} validates cover art requirement (400)
UPC auto-generation produces valid 12-digit code
DELETE /api/tracks/{id} - removes track from release
PUT /api/releases/{id} - updates release metadata
DELETE /api/releases/{id} - deletes draft release
POST /api/tracks with invalid release_id returns 404
GET /api/releases/{nonexistent} returns 404
Frontend: Release Wizard loads at /releases/new with 4-tab navigation

Frontend: General Information tab - all fields work (Album Title, Title Version, Label, Main Artist, UPC with Generate button, Product Type dropdown, Compilation checkbox, Metadata Language, Release Date, Catalog Number, Production Year, Copyright Line, Production Line, Cover Art upload, Booklet upload)
Frontend: Generate UPC button creates valid 12-digit UPC code
Frontend: Tracks & Assets tab - Add Track button works, track title input, audio upload indicator, explicit checkbox, track removal, Volume management with Add Volume button

Frontend: Territory & Platform Rights tab - 26 distributed platforms in grid with colored icons (Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon, YouTube, Tidal, Deezer, TikTok, SoundCloud, Audiomack, Boomplay, Pandora, Beatport, etc.)
Frontend: Not Distributed section shows 11 platforms (AMI, Anghami, Hungama, etc.)
Frontend: Confirm Album Rights radio buttons (Yes/No) work
Frontend: Summary tab - 3 expandable sections (General Info, Tracks, Territory) with validation
Frontend: 'missing item' pink badges appear for empty required fields
Frontend: Edit buttons navigate back to respective tabs
Frontend: Submit button disabled when required fields missing
Frontend: Tab navigation with checkmark indicators for completed tabs
Frontend: Save & Go To Next Step button advances tabs
Frontend: Previous Step button goes back to prior tab
Frontend: Previous Step from General tab navigates to /releases
Frontend: Dashboard sidebar has all nav items (Dashboard, Releases, Analytics, Wallet, Spotify Canvas, Content ID, My Purchases, Collaborations, Settings, Admin Panel)
critical_code_review_comments: Release Wizard properly implements 4-tab professional layout matching reference design
All required fields marked with * and validated in Summary tab with pink 'missing item' badges
26 distributed platforms displayed in grid with colored icons matching platform branding
11 not-distributed platforms shown in separate section
Rights confirmation has Yes/No radio buttons as specified
Tab completion checkmarks appear after navigating away from a tab
Edit buttons in Summary correctly navigate to respective tabs
Submit button properly disabled when validation fails
seed_data_creation: Test releases and tracks created during backend tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested the major Release Wizard overhaul. The wizard now has 4 tabs: (1) General Information - title, label, UPC with Generate button, product type, genre, compilation checkbox, metadata language, release date, catalog number, production year, copyright line, production line, cover art upload, booklet upload. (2) Tracks & Assets - add tracks, volume management, track title, audio upload, explicit checkbox, track removal. (3) Territory & Platform Rights - 26 distributed platforms in grid (Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon, YouTube, Tidal, Deezer, TikTok, SoundCloud, Audiomack, Boomplay, Pandora, Beatport, etc.), 11 not-distributed platforms, rights confirmation Yes/No. (4) Summary - 3 expandable sections with validation, 'missing item' badges for empty required fields, Edit buttons navigate to respective tabs, Submit disabled when validation fails. All backend release/track/distribution APIs working correctly.
